subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. Praise be to God, thou hast attained unto that for which existence itself was created [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهآئی و عنایتی لله الحمد فائز شدی بآنچه وجود از برای او موجود شده
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @knowledge; recognition of God, @purpose; goal of creation
